subject: feat(debug): complete debug system with console interception, PWA diagnostics, and production availability
body:
Upgrade debug system from dev-only to alpha-phase production tool per DEBUG_SYSTEM.md pattern.

Changes:
- debugLog.js: Add console.error/warn interception at module load, subscriber replay
  (new subscribers get existing entries), debugGenerateReport() with URL query param
  redaction, success severity support
- DebugPill.jsx: Add PWA Diagnostics tab (HTTPS, SW state, manifest validation,
  standalone mode, install prompt), embed mode skip (?embed=), use debugGenerateReport()
  from module, mount into static #debug-root div, multi-fallback clipboard
- index.html: Add static #debug-root div, pre-React inline pill with
  window.__debugPushError() global and 20s loading timeout
- main.jsx: Remove DEV-only gating, call __debugClearLoadTimer on mount
- ErrorBoundary.jsx: Bridge crashes to pre-React pill via __debugPushError()
- CLAUDE.md: Update debug system documentation to reflect new architecture

Tags: debug, diagnostics, pwa, alpha
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: minor

title: complete debug system with console interception, PWA diagnostics, and production availability
